items.title: UFC 328 results: Joshua Van stops Tatsuro Taira for hard-fought stoppage win in flyweight title defense
items.summary: Van made the first defense of his title against a tough challenger at UFC 328
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Rabada and Rashid firing in tandem - what more could GT ask for?
